name: 16p11_2_distal_220kb_SH2B1
description: 16p11.2 distal recurrent ~220 kb microdeletion / microduplication (BP2-BP3), flanked by SD blocks distal to the canonical proximal 600 kb (BP4-BP5) 16p11.2 region. Strongly associated with severe early-onset obesity (SH2B1 dosage); also developmental delay and behavioural phenotype. The proximal 16p11.2 file covers BP4-BP5; this entry is the distinct BP2-BP3 distal locus.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SD blocks of ~50-100 kb at >99% identity (BOLA2/SULT1A paralog cassettes shared with proximal 16p11.2); unique core contains SH2B1 (primary obesity gene), ATXN2L, TUFM, ATP2A1, RABEP2, CD19, NFATC2IP, SPNS1, LAT, NUPR1.
